title: Lesser & Pavey Bee-Tanical Set of 2 Ceramic Mugs - Poppy or Thistles Floral Design (Poppy)
features: DESIGN: Each set features a lovely floral design including poppies, daffodils or thistles while remaining a minimal design with a plain white background.
SET: Comes as a set of 2 matching mugs.
HOME: Whether being used for a cup of tea, coffee or your favourite drink, these mugs are a delightful addition to your kitchen.
GIFT: These mugs make a great gift for someone special as they come in a matching gift box.
